title: 3-Dot Menu Bottom Sheet
implementation_summary: The 3-dot menu bottom sheet feature was already implemented in commit 1978cfd. The implementation converts the previous dropdown menu to a bottom sheet pattern consistent with other sheets in the app.

ac_1.criterion: User views improvement card → Card renders → 3-dot menu button is visible
ac_1.verification: ImprovementRequestCard component includes EllipsisVertical icon button (lines 106-119) with proper testID and accessibility labels

ac_2.criterion: User taps 3-dot menu → Button press → Bottom sheet slides up from bottom
ac_2.verification: ImprovementActionBottomSheet uses animated translateY from 400 to 0 with 300ms cubic easing (lines 75-96), Modal with transparent background (lines 156-162)

ac_3.criterion: Bottom sheet is open → Sheet visible → All improvement actions are listed
ac_3.verification: Sheet contains Edit button (lines 193-202) and Delete button (lines 204-213), both with proper testIDs and accessibility labels

ac_4.criterion: User selects action → Action tap → Sheet dismisses and action executes
ac_4.verification: Edit handler calls animateOut which closes sheet then calls onEdit() (lines 135-140). Delete handler shows AlertDialog confirmation, then confirms and closes (lines 142-150)

pattern_compliance.notes: Implementation uses custom Modal with reanimated animations matching ImprovementEditSheet pattern exactly (300ms in, 250ms out, cubic easing, pan gesture, backdrop dismiss)

tests.notes: No improvement-related test failures. Pre-existing failures in NewsCard and ReportOutline tests are unrelated to this feature.

lint.notes: Pre-existing lint errors in unrelated files (whats-new, research). No improvement-related lint issues.

pre_existing_issues.verification_method: All lint errors are in files unrelated to improvements feature. No changes to these files were made as part of US-IMP-009.

completion_reason: Feature was already implemented in commit 1978cfd507c2f0aedaed986d27390309cd23e767. All acceptance criteria are met and verified.
